title: Food For Peace & Thought: China-US Agricultural Cooperation - Panel One
description:
Panel One:
Musical Performance - Chrysanthemums Terrace
Meixu Lu, cello, FeiFei Yang, erhu )  0:00

Introduction - Dennis Speed - Moderator, Northeast Coordinator, Schiller Institute 4:46

Dwayne Hopkins - Mayor of Muscatine, Iowa 
(Former) 9:18

Dr. Patrick Ho - Deputy Chairman and Secretary General, China Energy Fund Committee, Hong Kong, China  15:22

Helga Zepp-LaRouche - Founder & Chairwoman, 
The Schiller Institute  44:48

Lan Huasheng - Chairman of the Board of Shenzhen Dasheng Agriculture Group  57:55

Prof. Carl Pray  - Distinguished Professor, the School for Enviromental and Biological Sciences, Rutgers University  1:12:39

Wei Zhenglin - Agricultural Attache, Embassy of the People's Republic of China in the United States 1:30:06

Robert L. Baker - Founding member, the Schiller Institute Food For Peace, Agricaltural Specialist, EIR magazine  1:51:22

The Schiller Institute, in collaboration with the China Energy Fund Committee and the Foundation for the Revival of Classical Culture, held an all-day conference in New York City on July 7, 2017, which brought together farm leaders, agricultural scientists, engineers, and political and diplomatic officials from throughout the United States, China, and other nations. The conference attendees included more than 175 farm leaders, agricultural scientists and engineers, prominent speakers from China, diplomats from United Nations missions, New York City area contacts of all kinds, and an impressive delegation from the Midwest farm states, including four from South Dakota, two from Minnesota, and two from Iowa.
